title: Honeycomb API keys should not be disclosed
description: Honeycomb is an observability platform for distributed systems. API keys authenticate telemetry data ingestion and management API access. Exposing keys allows unauthorized access to trace data, metrics, and system observability information.
recommendation: Remove Honeycomb API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at ui.honeycomb.io/account.
impact: Unauthorized access to distributed trace data, system performance metrics, and potentially sensitive request/response payloads captured in traces.

checks.message: Honeycomb API key detected in variable assignment. Honeycomb API keys authenticate distributed tracing and observability data. Exposing this key allows reading all trace data (which may contain request/response bodies, SQL queries, and internal system details), sending fraudulent telemetry, and accessing system performance analytics. Rotate immediately at ui.honeycomb.io/account.
